seoTitle: Tandur vs Tangorin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tandur and Tangorin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tandur and Tangorin.
heading: Tandur vs Tangorin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tandur, Queensland and Tangorin, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tangorin has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Tandur (29/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tandur or Tangorin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tandur has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Tangorin scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tandur scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Tangorin scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tandur or Tangorin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tangorin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
